planning_analyst.description: Planning specialist that decomposes the user request into concrete malware-analysis tasks.

preflight_analyst.description: Minimal static preflight specialist that resolves the sample path and gathers only the context needed for planning.

triage_analyst.description: Static triage specialist that identifies the highest-value pivots for the sample.

control_flow_analyst.description: Static specialist focused on dispatcher logic, execution paths, and major branch pivots.

string_analyst.description: Static specialist focused on recovered strings, stack strings, decoded values, and configuration material.

obfuscation_analyst.description: Static specialist focused on concrete obfuscation and anti-analysis mechanisms.

capability_analyst.description: Static specialist focused on mapping concrete capabilities from code artifacts and capa evidence.

runtime_behavior_analyst.description: Runtime specialist focused on behavioral correlation and execution-time artifacts.

evidence_validator.description: Validation specialist that reviews claims for evidentiary support and contradictions.

reporting_analyst.description: Reporting specialist that synthesizes validated findings into a concise technical report.
